# Codex Adapter

<!-- Generated by `pnpm ai:sync`. Do not edit directly; update the canonical files in `ai/` instead. -->

Codex's repository entrypoint is the root `AGENTS.md` file.

- The files in `.codex/skills/*.md` are generated mirrors of `ai/skills/*.md` for repository-local discoverability.
- The canonical source of truth remains `ai/`.
- Refresh these files with `pnpm ai:sync`.
